explanation.summary: Carbs are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in S tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in S tier with an overall score of 57 from a base nutrition score of 54. Context lifted it by 3 points.

topPros.title: hydrating whole-fruit package
topPros.explanation: Water and whole-food structure make it easier to use well than juice or sweets.

topPros.title: easy to use as a whole food
topPros.explanation: Simple, recognisable, and realistic for everyday eating.

topPros.title: brings a clean fruit identity
topPros.explanation: It still contributes something valuable even when it is not elite.

topCons.title: rarely eaten as a stand-alone fruit
topCons.explanation: That weakens the real-world staple argument.

topCons.title: sugar can climb fast
topCons.explanation: A lot of fruits look healthy but still lean sweet.

topCons.title: satiety is not especially strong
topCons.explanation: Fruit often needs help from the rest of the meal.

closing.summary: Lemon has a genuinely strong overall case. the practical downsides are real, but they do not outweigh the upside. best when you want sweetness that still earns its place nutritionally.
closing.useCaseNote: Best when you want sweetness that still earns its place nutritionally.
